title: A Dream the Island Cannot Accept
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is a dream the island cannot accept.
scene: The scene follows a dream the island cannot accept, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, that's going a bit far, ain't it, bro?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Scrap, then?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Fisher Tiger the Adventurer is Back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Big bro Ti?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The big bro's back?!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: JIMBE!!! ARLONG!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Tell us about your travels!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damned if you two aren't looking well !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's Tiger- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This last trip certainly took you a while!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, yes. I've been through a lot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But right now, I have business at the Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why don't you stop by at my ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The Fish-Man District ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...started out as a gigantic institution to take care of orphaned children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But before long, it descended into chaos. The people in charge were unable to keep their charges under control...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: His second- in-command, jimbel...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong, the wildest of all the rebels...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so the area became a lawless region, home to the rebels and outcasts of fish-man island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ultimately left the country to find adventure.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And some, such as the coward macro, entered into the slave trade.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...found a place for himself in the Royal Army.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...became a pirate, wreaking havoc across the ocean floor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet one day, a shocking event occurred that left each and every one of them dumbfounded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so it was that they all went their separate ways.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Fisher Tiger's attack upon the Holy Land of MarieJoa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tiger-san stood up against the tenryu- Ubito!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...at once earned him the title "hero of slaves", and marked him as a terrible criminal.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Upon hearing of this, Fisher Tiger's one- time fellows from the fish-man district came together...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I would like to submit my resignation!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to protect him from the government against which he had rebelled.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go, you guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...to avoid discrimination between the former slaves whom tiger had freed and those who had gathered of their own free will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Though the Marines pursued talent-lessly

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...every one of their number branded their bodies with the "Mark of the Sun", covering the former marks of slavery.

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: Take the head of Fisher Tiger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's enough, bro!! Put him down !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ..Each attacking vessel was sunk without fall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And thus began ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The guy's not conscious !!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...the fish-man crew known as the "Sun Pirates"...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Slavery is permitted

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shahahah!! Well, ain't this something!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a few more of the most popular

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and to grant freedom a crime!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And still you tell us to love these humans...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: ...queen Otohime ...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: ...and the sun pirates continued their advance.

summary: A Dream the Island Cannot Accept. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
